Class DataStore

java.lang.Object
data.DataStore
public class DataStore extends Object
An in-memory data store for managing the active session and transactions.

Implemented as a Singleton. Used to manage the currently logged-in user and temporarily cache transactions. (Most persistence is handled by DataManager).

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static DataStore getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of DataStore.
      Returns:
      the instance

    • addUser

      public void addUser(User u, UserProfile p)
      Caches a user and their profile.
      Parameters:
      u - the user
      p - the user profile

    • emailExists

      public boolean emailExists(String email)
      Checks if an email is already registered in the store.
      Parameters:
      email - the email to check
      Returns:
      true if the email exists

    • findUser

      public User findUser(String email, String password)
      Attempts to log in a user with the given credentials.
      Parameters:
      email - the user's email
      password - the user's password
      Returns:
      the matching User, or null if not found

    • getProfileForUser

      public UserProfile getProfileForUser(int userID)
      Retrieves the profile associated with a user ID.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user
      Returns:
      the UserProfile, or null if not found

    • setSession

      public void setSession(User u, UserProfile p)
      Sets the active session for the logged-in user.
      Parameters:
      u - the logged-in user
      p - the user's profile

    • clearSession

      public void clearSession()
      Clears the active session (logout).

    • isLoggedIn

      public boolean isLoggedIn()
      Returns:
      true if a user is currently logged in

    • getCurrentUser

      public User getCurrentUser()
      Returns:
      the currently logged-in user

    • getCurrentProfile

      public UserProfile getCurrentProfile()
      Returns:
      the profile of the currently logged-in user

    • addTransaction

      public void addTransaction(Transaction t)
      Adds a transaction to the in-memory cache.
      Parameters:
      t - the transaction to add

    • getAllTransactions

      public List<Transaction> getAllTransactions()
      Returns:
      all cached transactions

    • filterByCategory

      public List<Transaction> filterByCategory(String category)
      Filters transactions by category.
      Parameters:
      category - the category name
      Returns:
      a list of matching transactions

    • filterByType

      public List<Transaction> filterByType(Transaction.TransactionType type)
      Filters transactions by their type (income/expense).
      Parameters:
      type - the transaction type
      Returns:
      a list of matching transactions

    • getRecentTransactions

      public List<Transaction> getRecentTransactions(int count)
      Retrieves the most recent transactions up to a certain count.
      Parameters:
      count - the maximum number of transactions to return
      Returns:
      a list of the most recent transactions

    • getTotalBalance

      public double getTotalBalance()
      Calculates the total balance (income minus expenses).
      Returns:
      the total balance
